shorts.title: Army Under Secretary Tours Scranton Army Ammunition Plant
shorts.title_distilled: Army Under Secretary Tours Scranton Army Ammunition Plant.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, Pa. — The Under Secretary of the Army, Honorable Michael Obadal, visited the Scranton Army Ammunition Plant on March 19. SCAAP is a government-owned, contractor-operated facility, and is one of 17 arsenals, depots, and ammunition plants that are sub…
shorts.content: SCRANTON, Pa. — The Under Secretary of the Army, Honorable Michael Obadal, visited the Scranton Army Ammunition Plant on March 19. SCAAP is a government-owned, contractor-operated facility, and is one of 17 arsenals, depots, and ammunition plants that are sub…

shorts.title: Fidelity D & D Bancorp, Inc. Second Quarter 2026 Dividend

shorts.title: Nationwide boom in AI data centers stirs resistance
shorts.title_distilled: Nationwide boom in AI data centers stirs resistance.
shorts.description: To fuel their artificial intelligence initiatives, tech companies are building massive numbers of AI data centers, with more than 4,000 in operation across the country. But some communities, wary of the environmental and financial implications, are fighting b…

shorts.description: Dozens gathered in Scranton for the annual 'Pancan Purple Stride Walk' at Nay Aug Park, raising funds for the Pancreatic Cancer Action Network.

shorts.title: Pennsylvania weather: cold, wet start to weekend before Sunday sun
shorts.title_distilled: Pennsylvania weather: cold, wet start to weekend before Sunday sun.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — It was a wet and chilly start to the weekend, and we're not done just yet. Showers continue for Saturday night with an otherwise mostly cloudy sky. There is the potential for it to be cold enough for some wet snowflakes across the hilltops of northeastern Pennsylvania Saturday night! Lows drop to near 40. [...]
shorts.content: (WBRE/WYOU) — It was a wet and chilly start to the weekend, and we're not done just yet. Showers continue for Saturday night with an otherwise mostly cloudy sky. There is the potential for it to be cold enough for some wet snowflakes across the hilltops of northeastern Pennsylvania Saturday night! Lows drop to near 40. [...]
shorts.content_distilled: — It was a wet and chilly start to the weekend, and we're not done just yet.
